_comment: The CONTRAST section (F-001): every retention read COMPLETED (status Ok) and genuinely returned nothing. This is a real, assertable empty tenant, so RET-01/RET-02 read 'Improvement' and RET-03 reads 'Informational' - NOT 'Verify manually'. Placed in the degraded sample beside the not-readable sections so one report shows both behaviors side by side.
